domain: hagfish slime defense (coiled thread skeins + mucin vesicles release into seawater, expand 10000× in <400ms, clog predator gills)
specific_mechanism: Small stored payload + environmental-water-coupling-driven massive expansion = asymmetric resource defense.
llm_application: SEAIT: detected-attack triggers emission of precomputed compressed-context skein that recursively expands into a large quasi-random scaffold filling attacker's context budget. Defender pays cheap; attacker pays expensive.
novelty_claim: ARGUS (2605.03378), DataFilter (2510.19207), Multi-Agent Defense (2509.14285) cover prompt-injection defense via filtering/verification. None retrieve skein-expansion resource-asymmetric throttle via recursive in-context expansion.
